text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... I feel like my training is starting to pay
off.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
This isn't so bad of a result... I d-do feel a little
more confident now...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Just maybe... I could work my way up to the front with a
bit more effort...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Hyaaah?! D-did I say that out loud?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
S-s-sorry, but could you pretend you didn't hear
that?! I understand I don't have what it takes!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I should be realistic, take baby steps, start off
with smaller goals... That's what I need to do!
choice_data_list:
Today proved you have what it takes to aim
higher!
Let's knock off those goals one at a time.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: R-really?! You really feel that way about me?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'm clumsy, with a long line of mistakes and
slipups... But if you believe I can, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Urk... Sorry, I m-mixed my words together in such
an important moment. I'll keep on trying my best!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: R-right! I can't continue on like this!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I don't have the elegance of Opera O, or Shakur's
analytical skills...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
And I'm bad at everything else, too... I have too
many obstacles to overcome!
choice_data_list: Let's take things one at a time.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
O-okay! I have a lot of areas to make up for, but I
promise to take on whatever training you give
me!
